acceptance_criteria: Non-interactive ADC refresh succeeds locally with token output suppressed.
No token, API key, credential JSON, account email, or Google Cloud project identifier is committed.
Vertex AI and Generative Language service readiness remains verified by service name only.
The result publishes the exact auth surface to use for retrying the frozen provider smoke without broadening model scope.

evidence.notes: ADC refresh succeeded with access-token output redirected away from logs; only service names were recorded.
Structured preflight records the usable auth surface and the selected retry model without credential values.
Review confirms this gate makes no model call and commits no secret-bearing identifiers.
No production or live-domain behavior changed; this was credential readiness only.

falsifiers: The gate must be blocked if credentials require an interactive prompt after recovery.
The gate must be blocked if any credential value or account/project identifier has to be printed or committed.
The gate must not claim a provider-model result because no model call is authorized in iter10.
The retry path must stay within the frozen iter09 model and budget scope.
stated_goal: Restore a secret-safe provider authentication path for the selected Vertex Gemini pilot without making a paid model call.
